_comment: Allowlist for the GitHub<->HF-Space module-drift guard (killinchu). ignore_paths/ignore_extensions are excluded entirely (built SPA bundles, vendored Cesium + binary assets). accepted_divergences are KNOWN, pre-existing GitHub<->HF divergences recorded so the guard lands green; each is still printed as a warning every run.
